description: International outlaw motorcycle club founded in Niwot, Colorado in 1966 by Bruce Gale Richardson. Designated a criminal organization by the U.S. Department of Justice. Has over 250 members with 35 chapters in 12 U.S. states and Germany. Sixth-largest motorcycle club worldwide.

country_links.evidence_quote: The first international chapter was founded in Munich , Germany in 1998. In 2001, additional German chapters were founded in Freising , Gangkofen and Nurnberg . Branches in Viernheim , Erding and Pfarrkirchen were established in 2007, 2010 and 2016, respectively.
country_links.context: The Sons of Silence have chapters based in Germany, including the first international chapter founded in Munich in 1998 and additional chapters in other German cities.
